## Poster Submission Checklist

Thanks for contributing your poster to the Morph Lab showcase! Please check off each item before requesting a review.

### Files added

- [ ] PDF poster uploaded to `assets/showcase/your-name-conference-year.pdf`
- [ ] Preview image uploaded to `assets/showcase/your-name-conference-year-preview.jpg` *(recommended — makes the gallery look great)*
- [ ] Showcase entry file created at `_showcase/your-name-conference-year.md`

### Showcase entry front matter check

Open your `_showcase/` file and confirm it contains:

- [ ] `title:` — the poster title
- [ ] `author:` — your name
- [ ] `event:` — conference or symposium name and year
- [ ] `year:` — four-digit year (e.g., `2025`)
- [ ] `pdf:` — path to the PDF, e.g., `/assets/showcase/your-name-conference-year.pdf`
- [ ] `image:` — path to the preview image (or leave blank if none)

### Description

<!-- One or two sentences about what this poster covers. -->

### Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything else the maintainer should know? -->
